ORDER GRANTING MOTION TO QUASH DEPOSITION SUBPOENAS, TO STAY DISCOVERY, AND FOR AWARD OF MONETARY SANCTIONS AGAINST DEFENDANTS AND THEIR ATTORNEYS

DISCOVERY 610, APPEARANCES: THOMAS J. LALANNE FOR PLAINTIFF AND MOVING PARTY: ROBERT LEE DBA EMBASSY REALTY HEARING HELD AND TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED: PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO QUASH DEPOSITION SUBPOENAS AND TO STAY DISCOVERY IS GRANTED. THE DEPOSITION SUBPOENAS FOR THE CUSTODIAN OF RECORDS OF FIDELITY NATIONAL TITLE COMPANY AND ANN CORKERY ARE HEREBY QUASHED. THE COURT ORDERS THAT DISCOVERY IN THIS ACTION IS STAYED UNTIL THE APPOINTMENT OF AN ARBITRATOR, AND WILL BE CONDUCTED PURSUANT TO THE PROVISIONS OF CCP SECTION 1283.05. THE REQUEST FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS IS DENIED. BRUCE E. CHAN.
DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT CONSOLIDATED WITH 432028
